data.body: Core convergence issue RESOLVED by the ToolStrategy root-cause fix (see c7c5): the verifier now converges on code-heavy tickets (WS-3: timeout at 500 steps -> 78s PASS) via output_strategy='extract'; sonnet is the decisive default (opus over-explores). The original 'practical budget' AC is met. Remaining here as OPTIONAL future optimizations surfaced by the prior-art research: per-criterion fan-out (LangGraph Send + deterministic reducer), per-criterion context PRE-SELECTION (Aider repo-map / FastContext line-ranges) so the agent doesn't hunt, and small bounded per-unit budgets. Left open for those enhancements.
